title: Database Management Systems
textbook_refs: Ramakrishnan & Gehrke: Database Management Systems 3rd Ed
Silberschatz, Korth, Sudarshan: Database System Concepts 7th Ed
Date: An Introduction to Database Systems 8th Ed

topics.title: DBMS Architecture: Three-Schema, Client-Server, and Storage Engines
Entity-Relationship Modeling: Entities, Attributes, Relationships, and ERD to Schema
Enhanced ER Model: Specialization, Generalization, and Aggregation
Relational Algebra: Selection, Projection, Join, and Set Operations
Relational Calculus: Tuple and Domain Relational Calculus
Advanced SQL: Window Functions, CTEs, Recursive Queries, and PIVOT
SQL Joins Deep Dive: INNER, OUTER, CROSS, SELF, and NATURAL Joins
SQL Aggregation: GROUP BY, HAVING, ROLLUP, CUBE, and GROUPING SETS
Subqueries and Correlated Subqueries: EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, and ANY/ALL
Stored Procedures, Functions, Triggers, and Cursor Programming
Functional Dependencies: Armstrong's Axioms and Closure Computation
1NF, 2NF, and 3NF: Stepwise Normalization with Examples
BCNF, 4NF, and 5NF: Higher Normal Forms and Lossless Decomposition
Concurrency Control: Locking Protocols, Two-Phase Locking, and MVCC
Serializability: Conflict Serializability, View Serializability, and Schedules
Recovery and Logging: ARIES Protocol, Undo/Redo Logs, and Checkpointing
Isolation Levels: Read Uncommitted to Serializable and Phantom Reads
B+ Tree Index: Clustered vs Unclustered, Insertion, and Range Queries
Hash-Based Indexing: Static and Dynamic (Extendible) Hashing
Bitmap Indexes and Column-Oriented Storage for OLAP
Storage Manager: Buffer Pool, Page Replacement, and Disk Layout
Query Processing: Iterator Model, Operator Algorithms, and Cost Models
Join Algorithms: Nested Loop, Sort-Merge, and Hash Join with Cost Analysis
Query Plan Enumeration: System R Dynamic Programming and Heuristics
NoSQL Databases: Document, Key-Value, Column-Family, and Graph DBs
Distributed Databases: Fragmentation, Replication, and CAP Theorem
Data Warehousing and OLAP: Star Schema, Cube Operations, and ETL
NewSQL and HTAP Systems: Spanner, CockroachDB, and TiDB
Graph Databases: Property Graph Model, Cypher Queries, and Neo4j
Placement Guide: Database Interview Questions and System Design
